methods.int binomial(int n, int k): Returns n choose k, also known as the binomial coefficient of n and k, or Integer.MAX_VALUE if the result does not fit in an int.
methods.int checkedAdd(int a, int b): Returns the sum of a and b, provided it does not overflow.
methods.int checkedMultiply(int a, int b): Returns the product of a and b, provided it does not overflow.
methods.int checkedPow(int b, int k): Returns the b to the kth power, provided it does not overflow.
methods.int checkedSubtract(int a, int b): Returns the difference of a and b, provided it does not overflow.
methods.int divide(int p, int q, RoundingMode mo: Returns the result of dividing p by q, rounding using the specified RoundingMode.
methods.int factorial(int n): Returns n!, that is, the product of the first n positive integers, 1 if n == 0, or Integer.MAX_VALUE if the result does not fit in a int.
methods.int gcd(int a, int b): Returns the greatest common divisor of a, b.
methods.boolean isPowerOfTwo(int x): Returns true if x represents a power of two.
methods.int log10(int x, RoundingMode mode): Returns the base-10 logarithm of x, rounded according to the specified rounding mode.
methods.int log2(int x, RoundingMode mode): Returns the base-2 logarithm of x, rounded according to the specified rounding mode.
methods.int mean(int x, int y): Returns the arithmetic mean of x and y, rounded towards negative infinity.
methods.int mod(int x, int m): Returns x mod m, a non-negative value less than m.
methods.int pow(int b, int k): Returns b to the kth power.
methods.int sqrt(int x, RoundingMode mode): Returns the square root of x, rounded with the specified rounding mode.
